creator: rebecca+freebsd@bluestop.org
text:
I noticed that the Jenkins bug-tracking system has a "Sponsor this" button for each issue (e.g. https://issues.jenkins-ci.org/browse/JENKINS-23524).

I was wondering if we might want to do the same thing for FreeBSD using the Bugzilla plugin from https://github.com/freedomsponsors/freedomsponsors-bugzilla-plugin ?
